title: cheilanthes paupercula
intro: Cheilanthes paupercula, also known as the rock fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes paupercula include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage fever and other symptoms of illness. Cheilanthes paupercula can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
